scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:shell" "npm run dev:products" "npm run dev:cart" "npm run dev:dashboard"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:shell && npm run build:products && npm run build:cart && npm run build:dashboard
scripts.setup:all: concurrently "cd shell-app && npm install" "cd product-catalog && npm install" "cd cart-service && npm install" "cd user-dashboard && npm install" "cd shared && npm install"
